headline: Pfizer Obesity Nod In China And Cancer Wins Reframe Long Term Growth
summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) received its first Chinese approval for obesity drug Severwin, opening access to a major new treatment category. The Severwin approval follows recent licensing deals that expanded Pfizer's presence in metabolic disease therapies. Pfizer and Astellas reported positive Phase 3 EV-304 results for PADCEV in muscle invasive bladder cancer, showing a meaningful reduction in risk of recurrence and death. The FDA granted full approval to BRAFTOVI combinations for metastatic...

headline: FDA vaccine head will step down in April after string of controversial decisions

headline: Pfizer nabs first obesity approval; Alnylam, Tenaya search for heart drugs
summary: The clearance in China comes weeks after Pfizer acquired rights to the therapy. Elsewhere, Alnylam is looking for “novel” cardiovascular targets and investors sold off Helus shares.

headline: China Clears Weight-Loss Shot As Pfizer Enters Crowded Market
